name: Foot in the Fire Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Sift flour and sugar; set aside.
3. In a saucepan, bring margarine, cocoa, and water to a boil; remove from heat.
4. In a large bowl, mix all remaining cake ingredients with the flour mixture and cocoa mixture; stir well.
5. Bake in a greased and floured 9x13-inch pan for 20 to 30 minutes, or until a clean toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Prepare frosting: Place margarine, cocoa, and milk in a saucepan; bring to a boil. Remove from heat and add remaining ingredients. Beat until smooth.
7. Frost the cake as soon as it comes out of the oven. Let cool slightly before cutting, if possible.
This cake is so good, you'd eat it with one foot in the fire if you had to.
